sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 493 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 3948/24. (Condonation of delay) 2. For orders on office objection No. 01 & 27. 3. For orders on CMA No. 3949/24. (Exemption) 4. For orders on CMA No. 3950/24. (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case. 17.12.2025 Mr. Asif Ali advocate holding brief for Mr. Farhan Ali, advocate for applicant. This is prima facie a time barred reference. On 06.11.2024, counsel stated that he was unprepared and sought an adjournment. Today, brief is being held and time is being sought once again for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
